rationale: Educ. Code §12.060 governs the form and substance of charter contracts. Ithas no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 12.060. FORM. A charter shall be in the form and substance of a written contract signed by the president of the board of trustees granting the charter and the chief operating officer of the campus or program for which the charter is granted.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses charter form, unrelated to homestead exemption.
